title: Bowshot SMP Pack
description: A simple, lightweight pack to enhance your experience on the Bowshot SMP 2.0!
body:
![Stunning Built-In Shaders!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dybDcEeo/images/d48be1686e663793f98f329e08a976319403ecef.png)
Comes with custom shader configuration included!

## Summary
The Bowshot SMP Pack is a client-side modpack designed for aesthetical and optimised Minecraft gameplay on the Bowshot SMP 2.0.

## Why should I install Bowshot SMP Pack?
Bowshot SMP Client features many quality of life improvements and has numerous optimisation mods to make your game run just that little bit smoother. Your gameplay will be clean and buttery smooth no matter how you play.

## Bowshot SMP 2.0
This pack is specifically designed for playing on the Bowshot SMP 2.0 Minecraft Server, however feel free to use this modpack on any server or singleplayer world!

You can join the Bowshot SMP by using this IP in Minecraft ([bowshotsmp.mc.gg](twitch.tv/bowshot)). Please note that the SMP is whitelisted.

## Authors
- Waffle

## Credits
We do not own nor maintain any of the mods provided with this pack, nor are we partnered with them.

View each mod's resource page by checking them out either in game or on the content page.

Mod Menu Helper sourced from: [Fabulously Optimised](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

## Licence additions
Please contact the owner of the pack (Waffle) before redistributing as a courtesy. The custom shader configuration is proprietary and may not be redistributed.
